LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT DURO DYNE CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED, FAILED TO SHIFT BURDEN OF PROOF. DEFENDANT FAILED TO PROPOUND "STATE ALL FACTS/WITNESSES" DISCOVERY. HEIRS' TESTIMONY IS NOT SUFFICIENT TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF. DEFENDANT FAILS TO PRESENT EVIDENCE THAT EXPOSURE TO DEFENDANT'S PRODUCT WAS NOT A SUBSTANTIAL FACTOR. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION FAILS BECAUSE IT RELIES ON A LACK OF EXPOSURE, WHICH HAS NOT BEEN ESTABLISHED. ROHNING AND COHEN DECLARATIONS ARE ADMISSIBLE AND CREATE A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-29-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT DURO DYNE CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.
APPEARANCES: JAMES P. NEVIN, ESQUIRE (BRAYTON PURCELL, 415.898.1555) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. HILLARY HUTH AND ROBERT M. CHANNEL, ESQUIRE (WALSWORTH FRANKLIN BEVINS & MCCALL, 415.781.7072) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT.
RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED, FAILED TO SHIFT BURDEN OF PROOF. DEFENDANT FAILED TO PROPOUND "STATE ALL FACTS/WITNESSES" DISCOVERY. HEIRS' TESTIMONY IS NOT SUFFICIENT TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF. DEFENDANT FAILS TO PRESENT EVIDENCE THAT EXPOSURE TO DEFENDANT'S PRODUCT WAS NOT A SUBSTANTIAL FACTOR. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION FAILS BECAUSE IT RELIES ON A LACK OF EXPOSURE, WHICH HAS NOT BEEN ESTABLISHED. ROHNING AND COHEN DECLARATIONS ARE ADMISSIBLE AND CREATE A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PJM/KD) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
